purchase: Here you can order advertising on taxi monitors. The minimum number of devices is 10 monitors, the minimum advertising placement period is 7 days. More details at the link. How many people will see your ad
how_many_people: How many people will see your ad
link_to_your_site: People will go to your website or social networks
how_many_people_text: In one car per day, about 30 people will see your advertisement. Thus, by ordering 1 slot (10 cars) for 7 days, you will reach an audience of approximately 2,100 people.
link_to_your_site_text: When ordering advertising with us, we will create a QR code that leads to your website or social media page. The client will only need to scan the QR code and order your product or book your service.
howToStart: How to start placing ads on our monitors?

steps.step2: 2. Log in to your personal account
steps.step3: 3. Upload an ad video and wait for approval and censorship.
steps.step3_1: 3.1. If you don't have an ad video, you can find the consultant's phone number in your personal account. Contact your consultant and order video production.
steps.step4: 4. Choose a city and the number of slots
steps.step6: 6. Get ready to receive orders from clients

minRequirement: Minimum number of devices: 10 monitors. Minimum advertising period: 7 days. More details via the link.

token_description: Profits will be credited to the MATIC(POL) wallet you used to purchase tokens.
token_profit_rights: Token owner has the right to receive profit of about 30-40% per year from the token value

enter_matic_wallet: specify the MATIC network wallet number in the field below, tokens will be sent to it
enter_trx20_wallet: specify the USDT TRX20 wallet number below, advertising profit will be sent to it
metamask_not_installed: MetaMask is not installed. Install it via the link:
specify_email_and_trx_wallet: Specify email and TRX20 wallet for profit

your_trx20_wallet_for_profit: Your TRX20 USDT wallet for profit

if_you_are_driver_or_car_owner: If you are a driver or a car owner
tablet_at_home_download_app: Have a tablet at home? Download our app on it, register
choose_and_order_frame: choose and order a frame for your tablet type
charge_tablet_attach_earn: charge the tablet, attach it to the headrest and earn
app_detects_viewers_automatically: our app will automatically detect if someone is looking at it or not
around_200_zloty_passive_income: about 200 zloty per month of passive income
while_driving_taxi_tablet_earns: while you drive a taxi, you don't use your tablet anyway. So make it earn for you

install_yourself_or_partner_shops: Install it yourself or at one of our partner auto repair shops

earn_5_percent_providing_api: Earn around 5% of the ad revenue by simply providing us API
earn_around_15_percent_ad_revenue: Earn around 15% of the ad revenue
how_to_install_monitor_permanently: How to install the monitor (tablet) via QR code
permanent_installation_description: Follow the instructions below to quickly register the tablet via QR code:
reset_to_factory_settings: Reset the device to factory settings.
select_language_and_wifi: Select language and connect to Wi-Fi (if needed).
on_google_login_enter_afw: When the Google login window appears, instead of email, enter: afw#setup
enter_afw_setup_instructions: This will activate the QR code setup mode.
camera_opens_scan_qr: After that, the camera will turn on — a QR code scanner will appear.
scan_qr_image: Scan the QR code in the image
installation_continues_automatically: After scanning, the installation will continue automatically.
enter_tablet_nickname_in_app: When launching the app for the first time, enter the tablet nickname (specified in your personal account).
be_careful_wrong_nickname_no_payment: If you enter it incorrectly, we will not be able to credit the reward — be careful.
choose_car_and_watch_clip: Choose a car and see what clip is currently playing there.
agree_terms: By purchasing tokens, you confirm that you have read the

investment.traditional_text: You can invest in our company in the traditional way — we will discuss the details, sign a contract, and have it notarized.
investment.token_text: Buying the token is a quick way to invest in the project and receive passive income.

whitepaper_description: Get acquainted with our project documentation:
mun_amount_placeholder: How many MUN do you want to buy
invalid_amount: Enter a valid number of tokens
ya_no_nickname_text: ⚠️ Your devices don't have a Nickname — this is required to track your devices. Fill in the form below. Come up with a nickname and send it.
ya_nickname_visible_note: Remember: the nickname will be visible to others.
